mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_short_sample_stats ( stock_code, trade_date, sample_count, win_count, short_win_rate, avg_gross_return_bps, avg_cost_bps, avg_net_return_bps, avg_win_bps, avg_loss_bps, profit_loss_ratio, max_loss_bps, confidence_level, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.sampleCount}, #{item.winCount}, #{item.shortWinRate}, #{item.avgGrossReturnBps}, #{item.avgCostBps}, #{item.avgNetReturnBps}, #{item.avgWinBps}, #{item.avgLossBps}, #{item.profitLossRatio}, #{item.maxLossBps}, #{item.confidenceLevel}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sample_count = VALUES(sample_count), win_count = VALUES(win_count), short_win_rate = VALUES(short_win_rate), avg_gross_return_bps = VALUES(avg_gross_return_bps), avg_cost_bps = VALUES(avg_cost_bps), avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(avg_net_return_bps), avg_win_bps = VALUES(avg_win_bps), avg_loss_bps = VALUES(avg_loss_bps), profit_loss_ratio = VALUES(profit_loss_ratio), max_loss_bps = VALUES(max_loss_bps), confidence_level = VALUES(confidence_level), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
